scores.notes: Minor text inaccuracies include 'INHALERS' instead of 'INMATES' and slight variations in phrasing. Numeric values are mostly correct but with minor discrepancies (e.g., '<0.6 mg nicotine/cig' vs. '<0.8 mg nicotine'). Layout and structure are well-preserved, but the OCR output is truncated, missing the final part of the purpose statement and insights.
